---
title: "Storehouse of Stories, A Edited by C. M. Yonge. Second series"
---

## Storehouse of Stories, A Edited by C. M. Yonge. Second series

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1872
**Genre:** Fiction (by others)
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company

### Notes

Like its 1870 predecessor, this was a volume of reprinted children’s stories by other hands. The stories were \'Family Stories\', \'Elements of Morality\', \'A Puzzle for a Curious Girl\' and \'Blossoms of Morality\'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
